headline: Own a piece of the future of food.
subhead: FarmThru is building a new kind of grocery store. Farm-direct, regenerative, and priced for everyday families. Now you can help it grow.
hero_copy:
The way we buy food is broken. Farms are squeezed. Families get food that's travelled thousands of kilometres in cold storage. And the big chains pocket the difference.

FarmThru changes that. We connect regenerative farms across NSW directly to families through local collection hubs. No middlemen. No warehouses. Just real food from real farms, collected fresh from your nearest hub.

sections.heading: How it works
sections.body:
FarmThru operates a hub-and-collect model. You order online from 50+ regenerative farms across NSW. Your food goes from paddock to pick-up in 2-3 days. You collect from your nearest hub. That's it.

No subscription. No lock-in. Just great food, honestly priced, from farms you can actually visit.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.body:
Every order through FarmThru means farmers earn a fairer price for what they grow. It means food that's days old, not weeks old. It means 100% grass-fed beef, pasture-raised chicken, heritage pork, and wild-caught salmon from named farms you can trace.

This isn't a meal kit or a subscription box. It's a grocery store built around the food, the farmers, and the families who eat it.

sections.heading: The opportunity
sections.body:
FarmThru is opening an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in July 2026. For the first time, you can own a piece of the business you buy your groceries from.

Minimum investment: $50. Maximum cap: $10,000 per investor. Join the waitlist now for first access, priority updates, and exclusive Q&A with the founders.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero image: aerial shot of green regenerative farmland meeting the coast. Warm morning light. Below-fold: farm partner portraits, product close-ups (beef, eggs, salmon), hub pick-up lifestyle shot. Clean, minimal design. Earthy palette. Single email capture form above the fold.
